recentArticles.title: Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10 - VPM
recentArticles.snippet: # Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10. Noah Kahan's coronation as an A-list superstar is complete, as *The Great Divide* debuts atop the *Billboard* 200 albums chart — and all of its songs land on this week's Hot 100. That record has sat on the *Billboard* 200 albums chart for more than three years — and in 2024, its title track became his first top 10 hit. But it's never taken him all the way to the top of the albums chart, until now. His fourth album, *The Great Divide*, debuts at No. 1 this week thanks to blockbuster sales — 175,000 copies sold — and the biggest streaming numbers for any record released this year. Consider this: On the day of *The Great Divide*'s release, Kahan's label dropped a deluxe edition (*The Great Divide: The Last of the Bugs*) on streaming services, expanding the album from 17 songs to 21.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導Noah Kahan專輯奪冠及Michael Jackson重回榜單，未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.snippet: ##### Kitco News The Leading News Source in Precious Metals. Kitco NEWS has a diverse team of journalists reporting on the economy, stock markets, commodities, cryptocurrencies, mining and metals with accuracy and objectivity. Jeremy Szafron joins Kitco News as an anchor and producer from Kitco’s Vancouver bureau. Jeremy began his career in 2006 as a Journalist at CTV (Canada’s largest network), initially engaging audiences as an entertainment reporter before pivoting to business reporting focusing on mining and small-caps. A graduate of Concordia University with a BA in Journalism, Jeremy's academic background laid the foundation for his diverse and dynamic career. Now, as an Anchor at Kitco News, Jeremy will continue to inform a global audience of the latest developments and critical themes in finance and commodities. Kitco Metals Inc. and the author of this article do not accept culpability for losses and/ or damages arising from the use of this publication.

recentArticles.title: Paris Jackson Scores Big $$$ Win in Fight With Michael's Estate, Judge Praises Executors - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson Scores Big $$$ Win in Fight With Michael's Estate, Judge Praises Executors. **Paris Jackson** scored a major win in her battle over money spent by the executors running her late father **Michael Jackson**'s estate -- while the executors also received praise for their work ... According to court docs, obtained by TMZ, a Los Angeles judge ruled that $625K in bonuses -- paid by executors **John Branca** and **John McClain** to third-party law firms -- will have to be returned to the estate. The rep added, “While the Court has previously approved several other bonuses to outside counsel over the years for their extraordinary services, and this was the first time they were the subject of objections, the Executors have always understood that legal fees are subject to court approval and have always required outside counsel to agree to return any funds to the estate if the payments were not approved.” The rep pointed out the bonuses were not paid to the executors themselves but rather to outside law firms.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了Paris Jackson在與Michael Jackson遺產執行人的金錢糾紛中獲勝，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Global 200: Justin Bieber and Nicki Minaj Hold the Crown - Live India
recentArticles.snippet: # Billboard Global Charts: Justin Bieber Retains #1; These Are Top Artists. The latest Billboard Global charts (dated May 16, 2026) show a mix of 2010s nostalgia, K-pop dominance, and a massive resurgence for the King of Pop. While **Justin Bieber** continues his global reign, the real story lies in the “biopic boost” currently fueling **Michael Jackson’s** legendary catalog. ## **Global 200: Justin Bieber and Nicki Minaj Hold the Crown**. Justin Bieber’s **“Beauty and a Beat,”** featuring Nicki Minaj, celebrates its second consecutive week at **No. 1** on the Billboard Global 200. * **The Coachella Factor:** The song’s resurgence is largely credited to Bieber’s performance at the **Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival** in April, reminding global audiences of the 2013 hit. Following the April 24 premiere of the biopic ***Michael***, Jackson’s hits are flooding the charts at levels not seen since the digital era began. * **Historical Context:** These are Jackson’s **first-ever Top 10 hits** on the Global 200 since the chart’s inception in 2020.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導Justin Bieber、Nicki Minaj和Michael Jackson在Billboard全球榜單上的表現。

recentArticles.title: John Legend to Play Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts 2026 Summer Gala - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # John Legend to Play Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts 2026 Summer Gala. Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts’ 2026 Summer Gala is set to be legendary. John Legend will help kick off the Summer for the City festival on June 1 with a performance at David Geffen Hall in Manhattan, *Billboard* can exclusively reveal. The EGOT-winning, Billboard Hot 100-topping artist joins the roster of a gala that is set to fete ballet trailblazer Misty Copeland (the first Black woman promoted to principal dancer at the American Ballet Theatre) with the inaugural Lincoln Center luminary award, as well as honor Andreas C. The Summer Gala and public concert raise funds to support Lincoln Center for the Performing Arts (a nonprofit organization) in its mission to provide free and pay-what-you-choose arts programming that’s accessible to everyone. You can get more information about the Summer for the City series of programming at the Lincoln Center’s website.

recentArticles.title: Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal, Including Songs by Fleetwood Mac, Beyonce, Lady Gaga. As expected, Sony Music Publishing has announced an agreement to acquire the complete music rights portfolio of Recognition Music Group from funds managed by Blackstone, subject to customary closing conditions. The deal will see Sony Music Publishing acquiring Recognition’s entire catalog of works, which includes shares in more than 45,000 songs, among them Journey’s “Don’t Stop Believin’,” Red Hot Chili Peppers’ “Under the Bridge,” Fleetwood Mac’s “Go Your Own Way,” Beyoncé’s “Single Ladies (Put A Ring On It),” Bruno Mars’ “Locked Out of Heaven,” Leonard Cohen’s “Hallelujah,” Chic’s “Good Times,” Soundgarden’s “Black Hole Sun,” Lady Gaga’s “Bad Romance,” Bon Jovi’s “Livin’ On A Prayer,” Rihanna’s “Umbrella,” Eurythmics’ “Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This),” Shakira’s “Whenever, Wherever,” Steve Winwood’s “Higher Love” and Mariah Carey’s “All I Want For Christmas Is You,” among many others. The deal is in partnership with the investment venture announced earlier this year between GIC and Sony Music Group, focused on acquiring music catalog assets across genres and international markets. The transaction follows Sony Music Publishing’s previous acquisition of Hipgnosis Songs Group in 2025, reflecting its continued collaboration with Recognition and Blackstone.
recentArticles.summary: Sony Music Publishing宣布將收購Recognition Music Group的音樂版權組合，其中包括多位國際知名藝人的歌曲，但與周杰倫無直接關聯。

Fully self-produced, the project marks a deliberate…. Fully self-produced, the project marks a deliberate departure from the character-driven, concept-heavy approach of his 2024 album, *I'll Always Come Find You*, shifting instead toward raw, unfiltered storytelling rooted in his real life. "But for who and whatever you got love for, just make sure you show up committed. *Labor of Love* is a story of discipline, sacrifice, and the daily work of balancing a high-profile music career with fatherhood. To celebrate the announcement, Blxst hosted a community pop-up at Harun Coffee in Leimert Park in Los Angeles, offering free coffee to mothers as a labor of love. If you a mom yourself or you know a mom, make sure you pull up on Sunday from 12 to 2.

recentArticles.title: Jeff Ross on 'The Roast of Kevin Hart' and His Favorite Cut Joke - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Jeff Ross on the ‘Real Tension’ Behind the ‘Roast of Kevin Hart,’ His Favorite Cut Joke and Who He Wants to Skewer Next (EXCLUSIVE). It wouldn’t be a roast without the Roastmaster General. Jeff Ross came out guns blazing at Netflix’s live skewering of Kevin Hart, the second installment in a series of “GOAT” roasts that was hosted by Shane Gillis. Dressed in a replica of Eddie Murphy’s red leather getup from “Delirious,” Ross needled Hart about going to a Diddy party, his “pieces of shit” movies and his upbringing. An admittedly hungover Ross called up *Variety* to break down the edgiest moments of the three-hour broadcast, the joke that didn’t make it to air and who he wants to roast next. When somebody says, “You look like the inside of a clam,” do you think about that when you’re brushing your teeth at night? ##### You were in the bathroom when Kevin was roasting you.

recentArticles.title: These Billionaires Were Raised By Single Mothers - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: ## From Elon Musk to Jay-Z, these members of the Forbes list have an extra reason to be thankful for this Mother’s Day. In the case of these billionaires, it was actually a great mother who helped them defy the odds to join the three-comma club. Meanwhile two of the most famous self-made women billionaires on the planet got their starts as single moms: Diane Hendricks, who got pregnant as a teen, divorced her baby’s father young and went on to support her son by becoming a Playboy Bunny and working in real estate before remarrying, while single mom JK Rowling was on welfare when she wrote the *Harry Potter* series. After his father walked out on the family, Jay-Z’s mother, Gloria Carter, worked for the city of New York and as a security guard to bring up the rap legend in Brooklyn’s Marcy projects.

recentArticles.title: Hayden Panettiere Details ‘Shocking’ Moment She Was Put in Bed at 18 with an ‘Undressed’ and ‘Very Famous’ Man on a Boat - AOL.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Hayden Panettiere Details ‘Shocking’ Moment She Was Put in Bed at 18 with an ‘Undressed’ and ‘Very Famous’ Man on a Boat. * Hayden Panettiere said she was “quite literally out to sea” when she realized she was “in danger” during the encounter. * The actress recalled being led into a small room and placed in a bed next to an “undressed” and “very famous” man. During the Monday, May 11 episode of Jay Shetty’s podcast, *On Purpose with Jay Shetty*, the actress, 36, discussed a chapter from her upcoming memoir, *This Is Me: A Reckoning*, in which she recounts being placed in an uncomfortable and frightening situation aboard a boat when she was 18. “She physically put me in the bed next to this undressed man who was very famous,” Panettiere said, adding that he appeared to behave “like this was just an average day for him.”.

recentArticles.title: Jamie Foxx, Kevin Hart Surprise Crowd During Ludacris Set at Carbone Beach Event in Miami - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Jamie Foxx, Kevin Hart Surprise Crowd During Ludacris Set at Carbone Beach Event in Miami. Ludacris surprised a star-studded crowd in Miami over the weekend as American Express and Carbone returned for the fifth year of their “Carbone Beach” dinner series on the sand. “I’ve got some surprises,” the rapper teased midway through his set, before bringing out Fat Joe to perform “Lean Back” and “All the Way Up.” The cameos continued as Wyclef Jean appeared on stage to perform the Fugees’ hit, “Ready or Not,” while Miami local DJ Khaled joined Ludacris later on for the remix to their 2010 collab, “All I Do Is Win.”. The biggest surprise came toward the end of night as Ludacris spotted dinner guest Jamie Foxx in the audience and playfully goaded the actor into coming on stage to perform his song “Unpredictable,” which features a Ludacris rap verse.

recentArticles.title: Whitmire inks with MCA - Country Standard Time
recentArticles.snippet: **Monday, May 11, 2026** – Country traditionalist Kenny Whitmire signed with MCA, unveiled the song "One Foot In The Grave" and announced his debut EP, "Fool In A King Size Bed," arriving June 12. Whitmire also released a video for the song. "Signing with MCA is one of those moments you dream about as a kid," Whitmire said. "To finally be here, putting out 'One Foot In The Grave' and announcing 'Fool In A King Size Bed,' it means a lot. Whitmire released "Thought Twice About Loving You," the ballad "You're Getting Colder," "I Gave Her The Moon" and "Me Being Me" earlier this year. "'One Foot In The Grave' is simply about my love for country music," Whitmire said. "My version of a 'Prop Me Up Beside The Jukebox' type song. I'm happy to have a song like this to put on my debut EP 'Fool In A King Size Bed'. Fool In A King Size Bed (Kenny Whitmire, Rhett Akins, Kat Higgins).

recentArticles.title: Sony Music Publishing Acquires Recognition Music Group - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: The deal gives Sony rights to 45,000 songs including hits from the likes of Red Hot Chili Peppers, Fleetwood Mac and Justin Bieber among others. Sony Music Publishing has officially acquired Recognition Music Group from Blackstone, the companies announced on Monday, giving Sony ownership of publishing catalogs from the likes of Justin Timberlake, Justin Bieber and the Red Hot Chili Peppers among many others. The company had been a major player in the catalog acquisition boom of the early 2020s, making deals with many hit songwriters and producers along with recording artists including a $200 million deal for Bieber’s publishing catalog and over $140 million for the Chili Peppers’. “Our investment in this extraordinary catalog reflects our belief in the enduring power of great music – a belief that resonates deeply throughout Sony Music Group and is shared by our partners at GIC,” Sony Music Publishing CEO Jon Platt said in a statement.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Sony Music Publishing收購Recognition Music Group，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’. The Kes the Band frontman checks in with *Billboard* at the 2026 Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival. There were still two more days of this year’s Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival following Kes the Band’s terrific Friday night headlining set (May 8) — and the soca group cleared all the competition. Fronted by Kees Dieffenthaller, who also goes by Kes, the band delivered an hour of high-energy renditions of contemporary soca bangers like “Wotless,” “Savannah Grass” and “Cocoa Tea.” The festival stop is just the latest in a string of hectic periods for the band — including a pair of Jazz @ Lincoln Center shows in January and the forthcoming North American leg of its Roots, Rock, Soca Tour. “When I was coming down on the plane, I had the chance to have a one-on-one with Billy Ocean, who’s also from Trinidad.

recentArticles.title: All of Chris Brown’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # All of Chris Brown’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks. Despite receiving mixed reviews online — including a response from the singer himself — the Virginia native remains in a favorable position as one of R&B’s lead anchors and enduring pillars of continuity. For over two decades, Brown has carved out a lane that now allows him to headline stadium tours — including his upcoming jaunt with Usher — while still hoisting a fistful of Top 40 bangers like “With You,” “Yo (Excuse Me Miss)” and “No Guidance.”. Brown’s last studio album, 2023’s *11:11*, earned him his second Grammy at the 2025 ceremony and spawned a top 40 Billboard Hot 100 hit with “Residuals,” proving he can still carve out classic records and memorable moments when the occasion calls for it. As the follow-up to the massively successful *Exclusive*, the album had a different kind of pressure around it, but it still debuted at No. 7 on the Billboard 200, giving him his third consecutive top-10 album in the United States.

recentArticles.title: Watch Blue Ivy, 14, ignore dad Jay Z’s one repeated request on Met Gala red carpet - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Watch Blue Ivy, 14, ignore dad Jay Z’s one repeated request on Met Gala red carpet. Blue Ivy’s Met Gala debut didn’t go off quite as smoothly as it appeared, as dad Jay-Z seemingly pleaded with her to remove her sunglasses on the red carpet. In a clip obtained by the Daily Mail, the 14-year-old daughter of Beyoncé and Jay-Z modeled her billowy cream Balenciaga dress and matching bomber jacket alongside her mother as they made their way up the famous Met Gala staircase. The publicist turned to ask Beyoncé to instruct the teen to remove the shades, and stylist Ty Hunter got involved as well before a tuxedo-clad Jay-Z made the same request. Blue Ivy was seemingly unmoved, ignoring the instructions and leaving the sunglasses in place as cameras flashed around her. “It feels surreal [to be back] because my daughter’s here,” Beyoncé told Vogue at the event, acknowledging her 10-year absence from the Met Gala.

recentArticles.snippet: # The Best Of Netflix’s Kevin Hart Roast: Lizzo, Teyana Taylor, Katt Williams, Venus & Serena, The Rock & More. Despite the “batch of bullshit” that was on the dais, according to The Plastic Cup Boyz member and longtime Kevin Hart writer Na’im Lynn, the stars were out this Mother’s Day — on and off the stage — at the Kia Forum for Netflix‘s *Roast of Kevin Hart*. Gillis kicked off the evening in Inglewood by thanking Netflix for “choosing me to host this celebration of Black excellence” before Usher, backed by The Roots, introduced the show with a performance of “Caught Up,” eventually transitioning to a musical roast of Hart. “You’re like Martha Stewart but without the respect of the Black community,” he said, before launching into a hilarious recollection about how Hart’s remarks at the Brady roast spurred him to get a colonoscopy screening, detect his cancer and be able to make it to tonight’s event to “shit all over you.”.

recentArticles.snippet: # Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal, Including Songs by Fleetwood Mac, Beyonce, Lady Gaga. As expected, Sony Music Publishing has announced an agreement to acquire the complete music rights portfolio of Recognition Music Group from funds managed by Blackstone, subject to customary closing conditions. The deal will see Sony Music Publishing acquiring Recognition’s entire catalog of works, which includes shares in more than 45,000 songs, among them Journey’s “Don’t Stop Believin’,” Red Hot Chili Peppers’ “Under the Bridge,” Fleetwood Mac’s “Go Your Own Way,” Beyoncé’s “Single Ladies (Put A Ring On It),” Bruno Mars’ “Locked Out of Heaven,” Leonard Cohen’s “Hallelujah,” Chic’s “Good Times,” Soundgarden’s “Black Hole Sun,” Lady Gaga’s “Bad Romance,” Bon Jovi’s “Livin’ On A Prayer,” Rihanna’s “Umbrella,” Eurythmics’ “Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This),” Shakira’s “Whenever, Wherever,” Steve Winwood’s “Higher Love” and Mariah Carey’s “All I Want For Christmas Is You,” among many others.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Sony Music Publishing收購Recognition Music Group的音樂版權，其中包含多位西方知名藝人的歌曲，但未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: A Thriller of a Biopic - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: Directed by Antoine Fuqua, the movie aims to humanize the experiences of Michael Jackson by showcasing his experiences as a child in the 1960’s all the way up until his “Bad” Tour in 1987-89. The film stars Jaafar Jackson, Michael Jackson’s real-life nephew, as Michael. Joseph Jackson (Colman Domingo), Michael’s father, is the film’s main antagonist, as his physical abuse and desire to push his sons to musical stardom overshadows the well-being of his family members. Though clearly there are still major flaws with the film’s portrayal of the Jackson family, as Janet Jackson, Michael’s famous sister, refused to sign off to be played in the film. The film’s musical moments were created by blending Michael Jackson’s original recordings with live, on-set vocals from his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, and Juliano Valdi, who plays the young Michael. Along with Michael Jackson’s once-in-a-generation vocals, he’s also incredibly famous for his iconic dancing, which Jaafar Jackson and Valdi both emulated flawlessly throughout the film.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導詳細介紹了關於麥可傑克森傳記電影的製作細節，包括導演、演員、劇情內容以及音樂和舞蹈的呈現方式，但與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: KJ Apa Goes Nuclear On His All-But-Confirmed Alter Ego Mr. Fantasy: ‘F**king Liar & Thief’ - pedestrian.tv
recentArticles.snippet: © 2026 Pedestrian Group Pty Ltd. PEDESTRIAN.TV Entertainment KJ Apa Goes Nuclear On His All-But-Confirmed Alter Ego Mr. Fantasy: ‘F\*\*king Liar & Thief’. # KJ Apa Goes Nuclear On His All-But-Confirmed Alter Ego Mr. Fantasy: ‘F\*\*king Liar & Thief’. *Riverdale* star **KJ Apa** has scolded what is highly likely to be his musical alter ego **Mr. Fantasy**, calling him a “liar and thief” after KJ’s co-stars appeared in his new music video. KJ, who is all-but confirmed to be the man behind Mr. Fantasy’s wig and fake teeth, took to Instagram today after the release of the singer’s music video for “Do Me Right”, which featured *Riverdale* stars **Lili Reinhart**, **Camila Mendes**, and **Madelaine Petsch**. KJ went on to accuse Mr. Fantasy — who has been linked to him ever since popping up on TikTok in mid-2025 — of “hurting me and my career”, claiming the viral sensation had “lost me a huge job” and prevented him from getting “serious work because people think that I’m a joke because of this guy”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導演員KJ Apa對其音樂分身Mr. Fantasy表達強烈不滿，指控對方是騙子與小偷，並損害了他的演藝事業。

recentArticles.title: New Music Friday: The best albums out May 8 - NPR
recentArticles.snippet: **Muna, Stephen Sanchez and the best new albums out May 8 : All Songs Considered : NPR Music** **MUNA. Lykke Li. NPR Music's Stephen Thompson chats with Celia Gregory from WNXP in Nashville about their favorite albums out Friday, May 8. Plus, a handful of NPR Music writers and critics offer personal picks in our lightning round. Sample the albums via our New Music Friday playlist and see our Long List of notable releases on NPR.org. # New Music Friday: The best albums out May 8. Welcome to New Music Friday, NPR Music's podcast dedicated to sharing the best albums out each week. The podcast is hosted by NPR Music's Stephen Thompson, and each episode features a member of the NPR Music Network of public radio stations. *New Music Friday is a feature of NPR's All Songs Considered podcast. *Listen to each album's best songs on our New Music Friday playlists on* *Spotify* *and* *Apple**, or* *wherever you stream music**.*.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容未提及周杰倫，主要介紹NPR Music於5月8日發布的新音樂專輯及相關節目。

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber Returns to No.1 as Most Listened-to Artist on Spotify - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Bieber Returns to No.1 as  Most Listened-to Artist on Spotify. It marks his return to the top spot since 2021, when he reached a record-breaking 83 million listeners. Justin Bieber is the most listened-to artist on Spotify. This marks Bieber’s return to the top spot in nearly five years, when he hit 83 million monthly listeners back in 2021. The record coincided with the release of The Kid LAROI and Bieber’s hit “Stay,” which spent 12 weeks at No. 1 on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100 — the latter’s second-longest song at the top. In January, he scored his newest entry in Spotify’s Billions Club with the Chance the Rapper-featuring “Confident,” from 2013’s **Journals**, which recently landed on the Billboard Canadian Albums chart for the first time, hitting No. 96. On the charts, multiple of his songs and albums re-entered the Canadian Hot 100 and the Canadian Albums rankings after his headlining sets at the music festival.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於小賈斯汀（Justin Bieber）在Spotify和Billboard加拿大榜單上的成就，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026 Full Nominee List Revealed - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: At the nomination announcement event in Tokyo on April 30, this year's MAJ Ambassadors, Kento Nakajima & Mei Hata, took the stage. MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026, Japan’s biggest international music awards show, has unveiled its nominees across 63 categories ahead of the June 13 ceremony. MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN (MAJ) is built around the concept of “Connecting with the world, illuminating the future of music.” Now in its second year, this year’s ceremony spans 77 categories across genres and national borders. In the six major categories — Song of the Year (100 songs), Artist of the Year (100 artists), Album of the Year (100 albums), New Artist of the Year (50 artists), Best Global Hit from Japan (100 songs), and Best Song Asia (21 songs) — five nominees were selected from each category’s entry pool. At the nomination announcement event held in Tokyo on April 30, this year’s MAJ Ambassadors, Kento Nakajima and Mei Hata, took to the stage.
recentArticles.summary: 日本國際音樂獎項「MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026」公布了多個類別的提名名單，但新聞內容未提及周杰倫。
